title: anthyllis vulneraria var. tricolor
intro: Anthyllis vulneraria var. tricolor, also known as the three-colored kidney vetch or tricolor knawel, is a perennial herb that belongs to the legume family and is native to Europe, North Africa, and parts of Asia. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Anthyllis vulneraria var. tricolor include its ability to soothe skin irritations, reduce inflammation, and support kidney and urinary tract health. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, often in combination with other herbs, to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
